---
title: "Downloads"
---

## Available files

- [BECCA Handbook](downloads/BECCA_Handbook.pdf)
- [BECCA Data Input Template](downloads/BECCA_Data_Input_Template.xlsx)
- [BECCA Questionnaire](downloads/BECCA_Questionnaire.docx)

## Suggested additional files to add later

- BECCA Handbook PDF
- Printable BECCA Questionnaire PDF
- BECCA Data Template Excel workbook
- Example cleaned dataset
- Example analysis script

::: {.callout-note}
Add any PDFs, Word documents, Excel templates, or images to the `downloads/` folder, then link to them from this page.
:::
